data.title: FLOKI and ONDO extend gains as Robinhood listing boosts bullish momentum
data.description:
Robinhood has listed Floki Inu and Ondo Finance tokens. The move grants the duo exposure to Robinhood’s massive 25M user base, FLOKI sheds its meme status, while Ondo fuels the RWA narrative. Digital tokens have staged recoveries on Thursday as the global crypto market cap increased by over 3% in the past day to $3
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/floki-and-ondo-extend-gains-as-robinhood-listing-boosts-bullish-momentum/

data.title: UK crypto investors commend FCA’s new crypto regulation changes
data.description:
Crypto industry stakeholders in the UK are praising the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) decision to open access to crypto exchange-traded notes (ETNs) for retail investors, a move seen as a watershed moment for the country’s digital asset market. The new policy, set to take effect from October 8, 2025, lifts a long-standing ban and is […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uk-crypto-investors-commend-fca-regulation/
